headline: Green Beret 💪🪖 SPILLS SECRETS 🕵️‍♂️💸 Wins $400K Maduro BET BUST 💥🍑
text:
🚨 SPECIAL FORCES STUD 🪖😎 Gannon Ken Van Dyke from Fort Bragg 🏰🇺🇸 got NAILED 🔨🍆 by DOJ for INSIDER TRADING 🤑📈 on Polymarket crypto bets 🚀💰! This Green Beret baller 💪🏀 allegedly DROPPED $33K 🤑 on Maduro's DOWNFALL 📉👋 using TOP-SECRET 🗝️🔒 deets from Operation Absolute Resolve – the NIGHT RAID 🌙⚔️ that SNATCHED 🫂 Nicolas Maduro & his wifey Cilia Flores from Caracas crib 🏠😈 on Jan 3, hauling 'em to NYC 🗽 for guns 💥 & drugs 🚬 beef they DENY 😤!

Van Dyke cooked up his Polymarket acct 📱💳 on Dec 26, 2025, SLAYING 🗡️ Venezuelan markets like a crypto Chad 🧔🚀, raking $409K 💦🤑 profit cuz he KNEW the RAID was COMING 🎉💥 before normies did! DOJ SPILLING TEA ☕: 'Clear insider trading, ILLEGAL AF 🚫⚖️!' Polymarket snitched 🐀📞 like a boss, 'We BUSTED the cheat & DOJ yeeted him – system WORKS 🛡️✅!'

CHARGES GALORE 📜🔥: Theft of gov secrets 🕵️‍♂️💰, wire fraud 📡🤑, commodities scam 📊🍆, unlawful cash flips 💸🔄 – Acting AG Todd Blanche preaching 'Soldiers TRUSTED with classified JUICE 🧃 not to YEET it for BAGS 💼!' US Atty Jay Clayton from SDNY 🗽⚖️: 'Prediction markets ain't NO SAFE SPACE 🛡️🚫 for classified CUM-DUMPS 💦📈!'

Van Dyke signed NDA oaths 🤝📜 promising ZERO LEAKS 💧🚫 on op deets from Dec 8, 2025 to Jan 6, 2026 – but bro went FULL DEGEN 🤪🎰 betting on TIMING & Maduro MOONSHOT 📈🍑! CFTC piled on with insider trading smackdown 👊📊. Even DONALD TRUMP 🍊👑 at some rando event goes 'Never heard, but I'll PEEK 👀 – world’s a CASINO 🎰🌍 now, Europe simps betting EVERYWHERE, I HATE THAT SHIT 😤🚫!'

Wall Street wolves 🐺💸 meets spec ops SEALs 🦭🪖 in this WILD INSIDER ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ – Van Dyke thought he was UNTOUCHABLE 🦸‍♂️ but feds said 'HOLD MY AR-15 🔫' and BAGGED him! Polymarket proving it's NO HAVEN for gov secret SIMPS 🤡🤑 – next time, bet on your OWN LIFE, soldier boy 😩💥! #MaduroMoonBetBust 🚀📉 #CryptoInsiderCuck 🍆😭
